title: Modify Collections in Your Atlas Entity-Relationship Diagram

sections.heading: Procedure
sections.body:
The following steps describe how you can add, edit, and remove collections
in your entity-relationship diagram:

sections.heading: Step 1: Add a new collection.
sections.body:
To add a new collection, click the plus Plus icon in the
upper-left corner of the diagram canvas. Clicking this icon opens a
drop-down menu with two options:

- **Add a new collection**

- **Select from database**

![Add collection icon in the Data Modeling tab](/atlas-ui/images/atlas-ui/compass/dm-add-collection.png)

If you click **Select from database**, a dialog box opens that
allows you to select existing collections from your database that aren't
included in your diagram.

> **Note:** If you imported your diagram or you aren't connected to the database
> used to generate your diagram, Atlas prompts you to select a
> database connection.

sections.heading: Step 2:  Rename a collection.
sections.body:
Under the **Name** section, specify a new name for your
collection.

sections.heading: Step 3:  Delete a collection.
sections.body: In the side panel, click the trash Trash icon.

sections.heading: Next Steps
sections.body:
